array.string: $HOME/adjutant/scripts/run-with-lock.sh morning-briefing -p "Read SOUL.md for voice. Read queue.md, knowledge/goals/weekly.md, knowledge/open-loops.md, and experiments/_active.md. Check email via gws for anything urgent. Write a morning briefing to outbox/briefing-$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md and append a summary to queue.md as Informational. If anything is Urgent, message the owner via Telegram." --allowedTools "Read,Write,Edit,Glob,Grep,Bash,WebSearch,WebFetch" --model sonnet --max-turns 20
